word: G4282 - προετοιμάζω - proetoimázō - pro-et-oy-mad'-zo - Ordain before

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προετοιμάζω

- Transliteration: Proetoimazo

- Phonetic: pro-et-oy-mad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to prepare before, to make ready beforehand

- Origin: from G4253 and G2090

- TDNT entry: 13:44,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G2090; to fit up in advance (literally or figuratively): - ordain before prepare afore.
